title: Faithful 32x AppleSkin Addon
description: Bring your AppleSkin HUD to life with Faithful 32× style — clean, crisp, and perfectly synced!
body:
#

The go-to 32x resource pack for Minecraft.

This add-on provides AppleSkin's icons in double the resolution, meticulously crafted to align with the aesthetic of the popular Faithful 32× resource pack. It ensures that hunger, saturation, and other AppleSkin GUI elements seamlessly match your Faithful 32× experience.
